text:
SALE AND PURCHASE AGREEMENT
Goods
Seller agrees to sell 100 laptops.
Price
Total price INR 50,00,000.
Delivery
Delivery within 30 days.
Inspection
Buyer may inspect goods upon delivery.
Risk
Risk transfers after successful delivery.
Warranty
One-year warranty.
Governing Law
Indian law applies.

summary.one_line_summary: Moderate-risk Purchase Agreement with 1 clauses. Minor tweaks are suggested for the 0 flagged areas.
summary.ai_executive_summary: This purchase agreement contains 1 clauses. No high or critical risk clauses were flagged inside the document. 3 recommended legal protections are missing, including Termination Clause, and Dispute Resolution Clause. Overall risk score: 29/100. Legal recommendation: Sign After Negotiation.
summary.overall_recommendation: Sign After Negotiation. The contract contains standard terms but has moderate risk areas that should be adjusted.

top_risks.reason: No clause defines the termination procedure for the agreement.
top_risks.consequences: Add a standard termination notice clause.

top_risks.reason: No mechanism is present to resolve conflicts outside of expensive court litigation.
top_risks.consequences: Add mutual negotiation and mediation clauses.

top_risks.reason: No governing legal framework is specified.
top_risks.consequences: Insert Indian governing law and local exclusive jurisdiction clauses.

clauses.title: Inspection Rights
clauses.text:
SALE AND PURCHASE AGREEMENT
Goods
Seller agrees to sell 100 laptops.
Price
Total price INR 50,00,000.
Delivery
Delivery within 30 days.
Inspection
Buyer may inspect goods upon delivery.

Warranty
One-year warranty.
Governing Law
Indian law applies.
clauses.reason: No issues identified. Clause conforms to standard legal templates.
clauses.explanation: Allowing unrestricted landlord entry violates your right to quiet enjoyment, compromises business privacy, poses safety risks, and can lead to disruptions of commercial operations.
clauses.rewrite:
SALE AND PURCHASE AGREEMENT
Goods
Seller agrees to sell 100 laptops.
Price
Total price INR 50,00,000.
Delivery
Delivery within 30 days.
Inspection
Buyer may inspect goods upon delivery.
Risk
Risk transfers after successful delivery.
Warranty
One-year warranty.
Governing Law
Indian law applies.
clauses.negotiation_advice: Strictly object to entry 'at any time without notice'. Insist on a minimum 24-hour advance written notice, entry only during normal business hours, and the presence of a tenant representative.
indian_law: Model Tenancy Act, 2021 — Section 15 (Entry of Landlord)

missing_protections.name: Termination Clause
missing_protections.why_missing: No clause defines the termination procedure for the agreement.
missing_protections.remedy: Add a standard termination notice clause.

missing_protections.name: Dispute Resolution Clause
missing_protections.why_missing: No mechanism is present to resolve conflicts outside of expensive court litigation.
missing_protections.remedy: Add mutual negotiation and mediation clauses.

missing_protections.name: Governing Law & Jurisdiction
missing_protections.why_missing: No governing legal framework is specified.
missing_protections.remedy: Insert Indian governing law and local exclusive jurisdiction clauses.
